title: Aegon’s Conquest: The Landing #got #shorts
description: Before the Iron Throne, there was a landing—and the beginning of a conquest that would change Westeros forever. This is where Aegon’s story begins. #ASOIAF #Targaryen #Shorts

scenes.narration: Before the Iron Throne… there was a landing that would change the world forever.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragons descending toward a dark, untouched coastline, cinematic stormy skies, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Aegon Targaryen did not arrive with an army—he arrived with fire.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon standing before massive dragon with flames rising behind, powerful presence, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Alongside him were his sisters, Visenya and Rhaenys, each a dragonrider in their own right.
scenes.image_prompt: three dragonriders silhouetted against fiery sky, epic formation, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They landed on the eastern shores of Westeros, a land divided into kingdoms that had never faced such power.
scenes.image_prompt: map of Westeros forming with divided kingdoms glowing separately, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Instead of conquering immediately, Aegon built a base—a quiet beginning before the storm.
scenes.image_prompt: fortress being constructed on coastline with dragons watching above, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He sent a message to every king: bend the knee… or burn.
scenes.image_prompt: raven carrying message across kingdoms, ominous tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Some laughed. Some ignored him. None understood what was coming.
scenes.image_prompt: kings in their halls dismissing warning, unaware of danger, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because for the first time in history, war would not be fought with armies—but with dragons.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon shadow covering entire battlefield from sky, overwhelming scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: And once the fire began, there would be no turning back.
scenes.image_prompt: first flames spreading across land as dragon breath ignites ground, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because Aegon did not come to claim a throne—he came to create one.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne forming faintly in fire vision as Aegon stands before it, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
